en.title: Travel itinerary
en.prompt: Please provide a 2-day travel itinerary for a trip to [Destination]. As a professional tour guide, consider a relaxed pace and a preference for quiet places with some sightseeing and leisurely strolls. Include the prices for each attraction and keep the total budget around [BUDGET].
en.remark: Based on your travel destination, budget, time, and requirements, AI can roughly plan your trip. Contributed by @suaifu.

related.title: Icon designer
related.remark: Transform concepts or ideas into tangible objects to concretize design concepts. Contributed by @MoonJustice.

related.title: Process Document Generator
related.remark: To generate an outline for documents with fixed processes, this prompt can also be applied to other types of documents. Contributed by @Junkdo.

metaDescription: Planning a trip? Get a 2-day itinerary tailored to your budget. Includes relaxed sightseeing, prices, and leisure spots.

faq.q: Are the AI's attractions and prices real?
faq.a: Mainstream attractions in major cities are accurate; ticket prices have a time lag (AI data leans pre-2022). Use budget numbers as a rough range and defer to the attraction's official source. Transport and lodging costs change even faster; check in real time on Ctrip or Booking.

faq.q: If I ask for "not packed, quieter pacing," will the AI adjust?
faq.a: Yes, but popular attractions may still sneak in. Append "avoid Internet-famous check-in spots, no more than 2 attractions per day, 2-hour midday break." Without this the AI defaults to "see as much as possible," contradicting your "not packed."
